description_long: This is a double-bladed axe with a broad, dark metallic head that features a slightly weathered and scratched surface, suggesting frequent use. The blade edges are symmetrical and curve outward, forming two sharp points at the top corners, while the lower edge is more gently rounded. The axe head is adorned with a faint red marking or symbol at its center, adding a distinctive visual detail. The handle is wooden, medium brown in color, and exhibits a noticeable curvature, likely for ergonomic grip and improved control. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the axe head, with no visible fasteners, indicating a traditional mounting style. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in an urban or industrial environment.
description: A double-bladed, weathered metal axe with a curved wooden handle and a faint red marking on the blade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the axe head and the full length of the curved wooden handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the broad, double-edged blade with a red marking and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the slimness of the blade and the handle's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view of the axe, mirroring the front, with the double-edged blade and visible red marking.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a round cross-section, medium brown, no visible grip features, ergonomic curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Double-edged, broad symmetrical blade with outward-curving points, gently rounded lower edge, faint red marking at center.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle fitted into the axe head.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: red symbol or marking on blade
